api: NetSuite REST Record API v1 (SuiteTalk REST)
scope: Tier-2 (AuthHook) migration of internal/connectors/netsuite: the 4 allow-listed REST record list endpoints legacy itself covers (customer/vendor/inventoryItem/salesOrder). NetSuite's full object model (thousands of record types) and its SuiteQL/SuiteAnalytics surface are far broader; legacy's own doc comment describes this as an intentionally conservative, small allow-listed subset, and this migration preserves that exact scope, no more.

excluded.reason: not implemented as a stream because it introduces an additional resource family or request shape outside this connector's current sync scope
